## Summary

<!-- What changed and why. One or two sentences is plenty. -->

## Proof

<!--
A CI check (verify-claims) requires this block. For each line, either check it
and give a REAL artifact (a CI run URL, or a file path), or leave it unchecked
with "n/a — <reason>". A docs-only PR can mark everything n/a.

Opening from a FORK? The check runs in strict mode and will NOT accept "n/a" on
the runtime: line — link the green CI run on your fork (Actions tab → your
branch), or attach a screenshot for a UI change. See CONTRIBUTING.md → "Pull
requests". Everything else can still be n/a.
-->

- [ ] build: n/a — <reason, or a CI run URL>
- [ ] tests: n/a — <reason, or test names / a CI run URL>
- [ ] lint: n/a — <reason, or a CI run URL>
- [ ] runtime: n/a — <reason, or an Actions run URL / screenshot for UI changes>
- [ ] schema: n/a — no Home Assistant config, entity, or WebSocket interface changed
